title: T-031 — Genealogy write on output (consumed LPs → output LP)
prompt:
# T-031 — Output genealogy write

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.3 FR-08-E3-007, §13 R1, §16.4 V-PROD-18

## Goal
Wire register-output (and register-byproduct) to write lp_genealogy.operation_type='output' linking all consumed LPs of this WO → produced LP.

## Implementation contract
Extend register-output: after wo_outputs INSERT, query distinct source_lp_id from lp_genealogy WHERE target_wo_id=:wo_id (rows written by T-025), and for each, INSERT a fan-in row {operation_type:'output', source_lp_id, target_lp_id=produced_lp_id, qty_proportional, created_at}. Apply same to register-byproduct. Add integration test for V-PROD-18: every wo_outputs row has at least one lp_genealogy row with operation_type='output'.

## Files (scope)
- packages/api-services/production/register-output.ts [modify]
- packages/api-services/production/register-byproduct.ts [modify]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/output-genealogy.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a WO with 3 consumed LPs, when register-output succeeds, then lp_genealogy contains 3 rows operation_type='output' with target_lp_id=produced_lp_id and source_lp_id matching each consumed LP
2. Given no consumed LPs (zero wo_material_consumption), when register-output runs, then transaction fails with error code 'no_consumption_for_output' (V-PROD-18 invariant — outputs require inputs)
3. Given output insert succeeds, when querying lp_genealogy WHERE target_lp_id=:lp, then row count matches distinct source_lp_id of consumption (R1)

## Test strategy
- RED: integration test asserting 3 consumed LPs → 3 output genealogy rows + zero-consumption-rejection before code change
- Run 'pnpm --filter api-services test output-genealogy'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow output without consumed LP genealogy (V-PROD-18 broken otherwise)
- Do not write genealogy outside output transaction
- Do not modify lp_genealogy schema

pipeline_inputs.description: lp_genealogy fan-in writes on output registration (consumed LPs → produced LP).
pipeline_inputs.details: After wo_outputs insert, query existing consumption-genealogy rows for this WO and INSERT fan-in rows. Block output when zero consumption (V-PROD-18). Atomic with output transaction.
out_of_scope: Do not implement genealogy query API (UI task)
acceptance_criteria: Given 3 consumed LPs, when register-output runs, then 3 lp_genealogy rows op='output' with target_lp_id=produced_lp_id
Given zero consumption, when register-output runs, then transaction fails with no_consumption_for_output (V-PROD-18)
Given output insert succeeds, when count lp_genealogy WHERE target_lp_id=:lp, then count matches distinct source_lp_id of consumption
test_strategy: RED: integration test asserting fan-in + zero-consumption rejection before changes
risk_red_lines: Do not allow output without consumed genealogy
Do not write outside output transaction
